FINAL INDEX OF BILLS AND RESOLUTIONS

                                        80th LEGISLATIVE SESSION (2019)

                                                                                      

 

*           Enrolled Bill

‡           Resolution Approved by Legislature

†           Deleted by Amendment

D           Bill Failed to Meet Deadline 

††         Vetoed by Governor

 

The effective date of each bill and joint resolution is October 1

following its passage, unless otherwise stated in the bill or joint resolution.
